theme_strategy: Both light and dark mode supported via Tailwind's 'class' strategy. Toggle must be available in the header or sidebar.

fonts.headings: 'Cabinet Grotesk', sans-serif (Bold/Extrabold for impact, tight tracking)
fonts.mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace (For tabular numeric data, PO numbers, dates, codes)

typography.instructions: Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Satoshi' via Fontshare, and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts. Never use Inter or Roboto for headings.

radii.xl: rounded-xl (12px) - For major modal windows, large widgets

shadows.lg: shadow-lg (For floating elements like modals, AI sidebar)

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border everywhere for a 'Technical/Swiss' crisp look. No blurry edges.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border/50. Use strictly for Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, and AI Chat sidebar.

layouts.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-card flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out (collapsible to w-16)
layouts.header: h-14 border-b border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl flex items-center px-4 md:px-6 z-40 sticky top-0
layouts.split_pane: flex gap-4 md:gap-6 (left pane: flex-1, right pane: w-1/3 min-w-[300px]) with a visible, interactive 1px border divider.
layouts.grids: Use 12-column bento grids for dashboard. (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12). Gap 4 or 6. Dense and compact for data.

header.brand: Maintain 'SHAKTI SCM' logo exactly. Font: Cabinet Grotesk, bold.
header.date_badge: Pill shaped, bg-muted text-muted-foreground text-xs font-mono py-1 px-2.5 rounded-full border border-border.
header.actions: Use sleek ghost buttons with hover:bg-muted for refresh, theme toggle, and AI toggle.

sidebar.nav_links: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground text-muted-foreground
sidebar.section_titles: text-[10px] font-bold tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground uppercase px-3 mt-6 mb-2

cards.dashboard_stat: p-4 or p-6 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-2 hover:-translate-y-[1px] transition-transform
cards.morning_brief: bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 to-transparent border border-border/50 rounded-lg p-6

tables.container: w-full overflow-auto border border-border rounded-lg bg-card
tables.header: bg-muted/50 text-xs font-bold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
badges.priority_score: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-md px-2 py-1 font-mono text-xs shadow-sm cursor-help (with Shadcn tooltip)

banners.warning: bg-amber-500/10 border-l-4 border-amber-500 p-4 text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-300 rounded-r-md flex items-start gap-3

ai_chat_assistant.container: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-80 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-l border-border shadow-2xl z-50 flex flex-col transition-transform transform
ai_chat_assistant.header: p-4 border-b border-border flex justify-between items-center bg-card
ai_chat_assistant.user_bubble: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm max-w-[85%] self-end
ai_chat_assistant.agent_bubble: bg-muted text-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm max-w-[85%] self-start

forms.input: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
forms.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium shadow bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-[0.98]

motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-[1px]) or color shifts. Do NOT over-animate.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure min 4.5:1 ratio. Dark mode text should not be pure white (#FFF), use #FAFAFA. Gray text should not be too dark in dark mode.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements MUST have visible focus rings (`focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2`).
accessibility.testing: All interactive components must have data-testid attributes.

charts: Use Recharts. Minimalist axes, grid lines dashed and very faint (opacity 0.1). Tooltips must be dark with solid border.
instructions_to_main_agent: This is a UI/UX CSS/JSX structural styling overhaul ONLY. DO NOT REMOVE, MOCK, OR ALTER ANY EXISTING BUSINESS LOGIC, API CALLS, OR STATE MANAGEMENT.
File extensions are .js (using standard React + JSX syntax). Do not create or rename to .tsx.
For the theme toggle, use a context or existing state. Make sure tailwind.config.js has darkMode: 'class'.
Replace generic default fonts with the requested typography pair. Import via CSS or <link> in index.html.
Use Shadcn UI components heavily but customize their styles using the provided color scales (border radii, border colors, background colors).
Maintain the exact layout map: Sidebar (Left), Header (Top), Main Content area, Right collapsible AI Chat.
All new or overhauled components must include `data-testid` attributes.
Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for headers or sticky elements; always use solid or backdrop-blur backgrounds.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge towards generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Make it look like a high-end, $100M+ ARR enterprise software (Linear, Retool, SAP Fiori).
Create depth through layered z-index hierarchy and subtle 1px borders rather than heavy drop shadows.
Every interactive element needs micro-animations (hover states, focus states).
Never use raw HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn Select and Calendar/Popover.
Use Lucide-react for all iconography. Keep icon sizes consistent (e.g., w-4 h-4 for inline, w-5 h-5 for sidebar).
Use Sonner for toast notifications if replacing the existing notification system.
